batch_summary.note: S-004: payment pressure Jun-Jul 2023 (ROW-2772/2906). 'Way behind' + lifestyle differential framing. ARC-RF06-001 Signal 4.

messages.text: You're a bit behind on daycare. You gonna pay the one that was due last Thursday?
Speaking of you working and making money you are way behind on paying the daycare and swim

primary_flags.classification: RF-06 primary Sev-1 — Two payment pressure instances in same batch. ROW-2772: routine pressure with implied contempt threat context. ROW-2906: 'speaking of you working and making money' — financial disparity framing introduced (per ADD-006: subtle lifestyle differential leverage). The parenthetical 'you working and making money' juxtaposes against unpaid obligations, implying Eli's financial priorities are wrong. ARC-RF06-001 Signal 4.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-005 (payment pressure in established coercion context). ADD-006 (lifestyle differential — subtle financial leverage).
